{{CargoClone
|name=Paramara EX
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=180
|gene1={race} ATK +50
|gene2={race} ART +50
|gene3=For Round 1, DMG +1.5%
|gene4=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=Mutant Minion Skin ATK +30%
|gene6=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=Mutant Minion Skin ATK +50%
|}}
